name: How to communicate between two Nodes behind NAT?
snippet: The idea is that you have a rendez-vous server, which the nodes 1 and 2 connect to. For that they must know the IP of the rendez-vous server. How to create a P2P connection when both clients are behind NAT Establishing P2P TCP/UDP connections (NAT traversal) More results from stackoverflow.com Missing: Bitcoin mechanism

name: The Bitcoin P2P Network Topology: A Centralized Architecture
snippet: ... nodes are greyed while unrouteable nodes behind a proxy or NAT are located to the of. the vertical line to distinguish them from routable nodes.

name: How NAT Traversal Works (2020) - Hacker News
snippet: These methods are needed for traversing between any two networks behind stateful firewalls, which will pose a barrier to P2P indefinitely.

name: NAT Traversal and Blockchain - Medium
snippet: NAT Traversal is a crucial method that enables P2P (peer-to-peer) connections in networks that include a NAT device. Missing: mechanism | Show results with: mechanism
